A [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''Twi'lek''' [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] was present in the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] when [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]] learned of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|his son's]] [[Death/Legends|death]]. The Twi'lek also ambushed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], but was killed along with [[Unidentified Aqualish bounty hunter (Tatooine)|another bounty hunter]].

==Behind the scenes==
This character was simply called Twi'lek alien.

==Appearances==
*''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
